DP.125.0000:
The Great Marsh is vast!
How vast is it, you ask?\f
Take a look from the Observatory
and you can see for yourself!
DP.125.0001:
Pastoria’s Great Marsh was once
a part of the sea.\f
The seawater drained away over time,
leaving the huge marshland.\f
That’s why they say there are rare
Pokémon that you can only see here.
